title: ventia crocea subsp. pilosa
intro: Ventia crocea subsp. pilosa, also known as the hairy Ventia or hairy golden Ventia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties and health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing respiratory issues. Ventia crocea subsp. pilosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
